title: Irish-American health-tech startup aims to rewire patient journeys [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: The Irish-American team are building a compliance-first platform that began in the neurodiversity sector and is now targeting diabetes, elder care, and the broader chronic disease market
summary_public: The Irish-American team are building a compliance-first platform that began in the neurodiversity sector and is now targeting diabetes, elder care, and the broader chronic disease market
